requirement_topic.en: 60 Hz Grid Re-Validation for Philippine Deployment
requirement_topic.zh: 菲律宾部署的 60 Hz 电网重新验证
requirement_topic.zht: 菲律賓部署的 60 Hz 電網重新驗證

summary.en: The Philippine power system operates at 60 Hz. PV inverter models configured and tested mainly for China 50 Hz operation should be re-validated for Philippine 60 Hz operation, including frequency protection thresholds, reconnection delay, anti-islanding detection, phase-lock behavior, thermal performance, label ratings, and firmware parameter locks used for the local grid profile.
summary.zh: 菲律宾电力系统为 60 Hz。主要按中国 50 Hz 运行配置和测试的光伏逆变器型号，应针对菲律宾 60 Hz 运行重新验证，包括频率保护阈值、重连延时、防孤岛检测、锁相行为、热性能、标签额定值以及本地电网配置使用的固件参数锁定。
summary.zht: 菲律賓電力系統為 60 Hz。主要按中國 50 Hz 運行配置和測試的光伏逆變器型號，應針對菲律賓 60 Hz 運行重新驗證，包括頻率保護閾值、重連延時、防孤島檢測、鎖相行為、熱性能、標籤額定值以及本地電網配置使用的韌體參數鎖定。

summary.en: China domestic PV inverter tests are typically built around 50 Hz grid operation. A China market certificate, datasheet, or GB/T declaration may not show that the same hardware, firmware, relays, magnetics, thermal design, and grid-profile lock have been validated for 60 Hz Philippine settings.
summary.zh: 中国国内光伏逆变器测试通常围绕 50 Hz 电网运行。中国市场证书、数据表或 GB/T 声明可能无法证明同一硬件、固件、继电器、磁性器件、热设计和电网参数锁定已按菲律宾 60 Hz 设置验证。
summary.zht: 中國國內光伏逆變器測試通常圍繞 50 Hz 電網運行。中國市場證書、資料表或 GB/T 聲明可能無法證明同一硬體、韌體、繼電器、磁性器件、熱設計和電網參數鎖定已按菲律賓 60 Hz 設定驗證。

gap.en: Provide a Philippine grid profile or utility-specific profile, firmware version matrix, 60 Hz type-test or engineering validation evidence, anti-islanding results at 60 Hz, and nameplate / manual values that do not conflict with the model imported into the Philippines.
gap.zh: 应提供菲律宾电网配置或特定公用事业公司配置、固件版本矩阵、60 Hz 型式试验或工程验证证据、60 Hz 下的防孤岛结果，以及与进口菲律宾型号不冲突的铭牌 / 说明书数值。
gap.zht: 應提供菲律賓電網配置或特定公用事業公司配置、韌體版本矩陣、60 Hz 型式試驗或工程驗證證據、60 Hz 下的防孤島結果，以及與進口菲律賓型號不衝突的銘牌 / 說明書數值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a practical utility-acceptance and commissioning requirement for Philippine grid connection, even where it is documented through project files rather than a standalone product certificate
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic baseline is generally 50 Hz; 60 Hz validation is export-market and project-specific

source.publisher: National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Re-check the inverter as a 60 Hz Philippine grid product. A 50 Hz China configuration is not enough evidence for local utility acceptance without 60 Hz settings, tests, and commissioning controls.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将逆变器作为 60 Hz 菲律宾电网产品重新核查。仅有 50 Hz 中国配置，不足以在没有 60 Hz 参数、测试和调试控制的情况下支持当地公用事业公司接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將逆變器作為 60 Hz 菲律賓電網產品重新核查。僅有 50 Hz 中國配置，不足以在沒有 60 Hz 參數、測試和調試控制的情況下支持當地公用事業公司接受。
